Next;fontSize=13;" value="<b>Step_1 Verify Archive</b><br>Confirm JDK 11.0.31 tar.gz exists<br><font style="font-size:11px;color:#5E6976">missing -&gt; prompt download and exit</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="124" width="250" x="120" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="1" Next;fontSize=13;" value="<b>Step_2 Check Current Version</b><br>Run jdk11/bin/java --version<br><font style="font-size:11px;color:#5E6976">already 11.0.31 -&gt; exit</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="124" width="250" x="420" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=18;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=8;fillColor=#EEE8F8;strokeColor=#C8BCD9;strokeWidth=1.2;shadow=0;overflow=hidden;fontFamily=Avenir Next;fontSize=13;" value="<b>Step_3 Stop Services</b><br>Stop Ab Initio application services<br><font style="font-size:11px;color:#5E6976">prod-cont skips this step</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry Next;fontSize=13;" value="<b>Step_4 Extract New JDK</b><br>Install under /FCR_APP/abinitio/java<br><font style="font-size:11px;color:#5E6976">tar -xzf target archive</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="124" width="250" x="1020" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" parent="1" Next;fontSize=13;" value="<b>Step_5 Update Symlinks</b><br>Switch jdk11 and jdk1.8.0_191<br><font style="font-size:11px;color:#5E6976">record old JDK target first</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="124" width="250" x="1320" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s6" parent="1" Next;fontSize=13;" value="<b>Step_6 Verify App Java</b><br>Confirm active version is 11.0.31<br><font style="font-size:11px;color:#5E6976">mismatch -&gt; fail and exit</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="124" width="250" x="1620" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="missing_archive" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=18;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=8;fillColor=#F7ECEC;strokeColor=#D8C4C4;strokeWidth=1.2;shadow=0;overflow=hidden;fontFamily=Avenir Next;fontSize=13;" value="<b>Exit: Archive Missing</b><br>Download target JDK from Nexus first<br><font style="font-size:11px;color:#5E6976">do not continue the upgrade</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="94" width="250" x="120" y="445" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="already_target" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=18;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=8;fillColor=#EAF5EC;strokeColor=#C0D5C4;strokeWidth=1.2;shadow=0;overflow=hidden;fontFamily=Avenir Next;fontSize=13;" value="<b>Exit: Already Current</b><br>No service stop or restart needed<br><font style="font-size:11px;color:#5E6976">leave current state unchanged</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="94" width="250" x="420" y="445" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="app_failed" parent="1" div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 71px; margin-left: 96px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #25313D;

display: inline-block; font-size: 30px; font-family: 'Avenir Next'; color: light-dark(#25313D, #bcc6d0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Upgrade JDK Flow

already 11.0.31 -> exit

do not continue the upgrade
